phase: Designer UI Restoration - Canvas & Geometry Fixes
summary: Successfully implemented canvas rendering improvements, field dragging, geometry utilities, and ACORD binding interactivity for the Forms Designer

components_fixed.changes: Added explicit width/height parameters to KonvaImage for proper PDF rendering at full resolution. The Stage/Layer hierarchy now handles zoom/pan independently.
components_fixed.tests: PDF background now renders at full page size without distortion

components_fixed.changes: Enhanced field rendering with confidence color coding (green >80%, orange 60-80%, red <60%), confidence badge display, and KonvaGroup wrapper for consistency
components_fixed.tests: Fields render with color-coded borders and confidence percentages

components_fixed.changes: Made field KonvaGroups draggable with onDragEnd handler that updates field position and records undo/redo history. Added click handlers for field selection with Shift+click for multi-select.
components_fixed.tests: ✓ Fields are now draggable and move smoothly on canvas ✓ Field positions persist after drag ✓ Undo/redo works for field movement

components_fixed.changes: Created comprehensive geometry utilities for coordinate transformation across multi-page PDFs: normalizePageCoordinates, denormalizePageCoordinates, scaleBoundingBox, computePageOffsets, calculateTotalCanvasHeight, getPageAtYCoordinate, constrainFieldToPage, getBoundingBoxIntersection
components_fixed.tests: Utility functions exported and ready for canvas coordinate system

components_fixed.changes: Added onClick handlers to ACORD candidate suggestions with handleSelectCandidate function. Integrated useMappingStore updateMapping to persist binding choices. Added hover state styling for better UX.
components_fixed.tests: ✓ ACORD candidates are now clickable ✓ Clicking a candidate updates the mapping ✓ Selected candidate shows checkmark and highlight

components_fixed.changes: Added comprehensive CSS classes for designer styling: .designer-canvas, .designer-field-group, .designer-field-handle, .designer-binding-candidate, .designer-toolbar-button, .designer-panel-section, and snap guide styles
components_fixed.tests: CSS classes available for component styling

features_implemented: Field dragging with smooth Konva animation and position persistence
Geometry utilities for multi-page PDF coordinate transformation
Interactive ACORD binding selection with visual feedback
Undo/redo support for field position changes
PDF background rendering at proper resolution

manual_testing: ✓ Field creation and rendering on canvas

pending_tasks.description: Add KonvaTransformer instance for visual resize and rotation handles on selected fields
Display yellow dashed lines when dragging fields near snap grid or other fields
Enable toolbar buttons to enter placement mode with crosshair cursor
Use geometry utilities to validate field placement across page boundaries
